shortDescription: Immigration NZ · Visitor visa · Tourism, family · Genuine visitor

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Visitor Visa fee (NZD $341 approx for online) on immigration.govt.nz before quoting.

alert.title: Genuine visitor intent
alert.body: INZ must be satisfied applicant will leave NZ after visit. Strong ties to India are essential.

about.label: Description
about.value: Visitor visa for tourism, visiting family/friends, or short business visits to New Zealand. Applied online via Immigration NZ.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Temporary visit purpose · Funds for trip · Strong ties to India · Health and character requirements

about.label: No work permitted
about.value: Visitors cannot work or study long courses. Short recreational study may be permitted—verify rules.

about.label: After approval
about.value: Respect visa conditions and departure date. Overstay affects future NZ applications.

redFlagsBanner: After refusal, strengthen ties evidence before reapplication.

redFlags.title: Weak ties to India
redFlags.description: No employment, assets, or family obligations.
redFlags.fix: Employment letter, business, property, family proof

redFlags.title: Vague purpose
redFlags.description: Unclear itinerary or long stay without reason.

redFlags.title: Prior refusals hidden
redFlags.description: NZ or other refusals not disclosed.

redFlags.title: Generic cover letter
redFlags.fix: Personalised statement with dates and ties

redFlags.title: Health issues undisclosed
redFlags.fix: Honest health disclosure per INZ form

faqs.a: No. INZ decides each case individually.
Enough for trip duration—no fixed amount but must be credible.
No. Work not permitted on visitor visa.

faqs.q: Can switch to student in NZ?
faqs.a: Generally must apply from outside NZ—verify current rules.
Yes when circumstances improve.
Recommended for family visits.
Typically 3–6 weeks standard.
Officer decides visa conditions at approval.

Valid passport is typically required.
Clear visit purpose is typically required.
Proof of funds is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Strong ties to India required?
faqs.a: Strong ties to India is typically required.

Health/character requirements is typically required.
Immigration history disclosed is typically required.
3–6w — Standard
NZD $341 — Online approx

faqs.a: 73% — ~61% benchmark
9 — + ties evidence
See fee tab — + govt only

faqs.q: What if the client has Weak ties to India?
faqs.a: Employment letter, business, property, family proof

faqs.q: Why is Weak ties to India a problem?
faqs.a: No employment, assets, or family obligations.

faqs.q: What if the client has Insufficient funds?
faqs.a: Bank history, ITR, sponsor letter

faqs.q: Why is Insufficient funds a problem?
faqs.a: Cannot credibly fund trip.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: For family visits collect host invitation and status
postApproval: Explain visa conditions and departure obligation

sampleDocs.title: Sample passport bio page (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Show clients which pages to scan — MRZ visible, no glare, full spread.

sampleDocs.title: Sample bank statement (mock)
sampleDocs.description: 6-month statement with name, account number, and closing balance — explain seasoning.

sampleDocs.title: Sample invitation / sponsor letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Host details, relationship, accommodation, and duration of stay.

sampleDocs.title: Sample travel itinerary (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Flights, hotels, and day-wise plan for visitor visa credibility.

sampleDocs.title: Sample employment / NOC letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Employer letter confirming leave, role, salary, and return to India.

sampleDocs.title: Sample property / ties document (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Sale deed or tax receipt — explain home-country ties.
